name: delivery_eta_atlanta
body_text: Hey Mike, ETA Atlanta terminal {{1}}. Light traffic on I-20 E. Will text when 30 min out.

name: cpap_reorder_confirm
body_text: Restwell Medical Supply: your monthly CPAP filter order #{{1}} shipped today via FedEx. Tracking: {{2}}.

name: appt_reminder_stubbs
body_text: Reminder: Annual physical with Dr. Stubbs at Irondale Family Practice on {{1}}. Fasting required.

name: appt_reminder_cho
body_text: Reminder: Sleep follow-up with Dr. Cho at Birmingham Sleep and Pulmonary on {{1}}. Bring myAir data.

name: home_time_eta
body_text: Janelle, home Friday by 6 PM if dispatch holds. Call you when I'm parked.

name: sunday_dinner_confirm
body_text: Tammy, confirming Sunday 6 PM at your place. Bringing the corn casserole Mama Jean wanted.

name: weather_alert_smokies
body_text: Ray, ice on I-40 east of Knoxville. Pulling early at TA exit 421. Y'all be careful up there.

name: fuel_advisory
body_text: Mike, fuel jumped 18 cents at Pilot #391 Cullman. Pushing to Love's #582 Calera, 40 mi south.

name: load_received_terminal
body_text: Load #{{1}} received at Ridgeline terminal. Walking pre-trip in 15.

name: load_dropped_dock
body_text: Load #{{1}} dropped at {{2}} dock {{3}} at {{4}}. BOL signed. Heading back to truck.

name: mama_jean_groceries
body_text: Mama, Instacart's bringing the groceries between 2 and 4 today. Stay seated, Dale's checking in tomorrow.

name: mama_jean_handyman
body_text: Mama, Cousin Eddie is by the house Saturday morning to fix the back porch step. Don't pay him cash, I got it.

name: janelle_birthday
body_text: Happy birthday, Daddy's girl. Box should be at your door today. Call you tonight from Memphis.

name: dispatch_change
body_text: Mike, dispatch shows me on Tuesday Memphis run but I'm scheduled home time. Need to swap.

name: truck_mechanical
body_text: Doug, T680 throwing P0420 catalyst code. Pulled over at TA #80 Lakeland. Need a fleet ticket opened.

name: weekly_hos_check
body_text: Mike, 8.5 hours left on the 70-hour clock. Reset starts after Memphis drop tomorrow night.

name: cpap_supply_low
body_text: Restwell, running low on P30i cushions. Need shipment by the 25th to hit me at home time.

name: ride_share_terminal
body_text: Janelle, Uber from Ridgeline terminal to Cloverdale Commons. ETA 20 min. F-150's at the apartment.

name: tide_kickoff_alert
body_text: Dale, Bama vs Tennessee kickoff 2:30 Saturday. Pulling into Birmingham Friday night. Roll Tide.

name: carol_janelle_coord
body_text: Carol, picking up Janelle Friday from Nashville for Mama Jean's birthday weekend. Will text when I'm leaving.
